data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: WhatsApp is built using a microservices architecture to ensure scalability and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Independently deployable services, communication via APIs.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption Framework
data.description: WhatsApp uses Signal Protocol for end-to-end encryption to ensure user privacy and security.
data.technical_spec: Open Whisper Systems protocol, cryptographic algorithms.

data.title: Cross-Platform Development
data.description: WhatsApp supports multiple platforms offering native experiences on each.
data.technical_spec: Native iOS, Android app development, web client integration.

data.title: Real-Time Messaging Infrastructure
data.description: Optimized for efficient, low-latency message delivery worldwide.

data.title: Resource Optimization
data.description: Built to minimize data usage without sacrificing performance quality.
